daily.today_energy: Your vibe is expansive and curious today. There's a quiet momentum building beneath the surface—trust the timing and let yourself explore without forcing anything. The universe is setting up something interesting.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, meaningful convos are flowing naturally. Single? Someone interesting might cross your path, but the real gift today is falling back in love with yourself. That's the energy to radiate.
daily.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual. This is a solid day to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or have a real conversation with someone who matters professionally. Your instincts are worth listening to.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Whether that's a slower workout, extra water, or just being present with what you're eating—tuning in beats pushing through. Rest is productive too.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about authentic self-expression, Sag. The cosmos is nudging you to speak your truth without overthinking it. Trust that magnetic energy you naturally carry—it's working harder than you think.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, this is your moment to be unapologetically you. Someone's gonna be drawn to that realness. If you're already vibing with someone, deeper convos are on the menu.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are sharp right now. This isn't the week to play small—pitch that idea, take the meeting, show up differently. Your professional energy is giving main character energy.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and listen more. Moving mindfully—whether that's yoga, walks, or just stretching—will feel way better than pushing hard. Rest is productive too.
